arts.ttl: Arsenal eye shock Ollie Watkins transfer and get immediate Aston Villa response
arts.sum: Arsenal have been urged to sign a striker this month - and it seems they have set their sights on doing a huge deal for Aston Villa's Ollie Watkins before the transfer deadline

arts.ttl: Report: Arsenal can't believe who they now might have a chance to sign before deadline day
arts.sum: We’re into the final knockings of the transfer window, and it’s at this time of the month that clubs and players begin to panic. Indeed,...

arts.ttl: Mathys Tel has already told Mikel Arteta his best position as Arsenal hijack Chelsea transfer
arts.sum: The report from the Independent adds that the Frenchman would be 'very open' to joining Arsenal due to the club's current status and possibility for game time. Mathys Tel has already told Mikel Arteta exactly where he wants to play ahead of a potential transfer to Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Ollie Watkins has already given Arsenal green light as new £60m transfer claims emerge
arts.sum: Talks with Aston Villa and Watkins are said to be "advancing", with the north Londoners keen to sign a striker before deadline day. Watkins is said to want the move, with Villa keen to sign Chelsea star Joao Felix before sanctioning any deal.

arts.ttl: Ayden Heaven Man Utd transfer proves Arsenal must change after Chido Obi-Martin example - Sam Truelove
arts.sum: With Heaven looking likely to leave the club in the coming days, just like fellow Arsenal academy prospects Obi-Martin, Cozier-Duberry and Walters have done in recent months, it highlights a clear problem in north London right now. Heaven and Obi-Martin are not the only Hale Enders to leave Arsenal in recent years due to a lack of pathway to the first team.

arts.ttl: Arsenal make shock bid for Ollie Watkins: Aston Villa reject offer for star striker as Mikel Arteta looks to bolster his attacking force before the transfer window slams shut
arts.sum: SAMI MOKBEL: It is understood Arsenal have made an initial offer for Aston Villa forward Watkins which has been rejected but an improved attempt is expected.

arts.ttl: Arsenal told Victor Osimhen has TWO release clauses
arts.sum: However, any transfer deal for Osimhen - who is on loan at Galatasaray from Napoli - will be extremely expensive in January. Osimhen joined Galatasaray last summer on loan for the season from Napoli until June 2025.

arts.ttl: Arsenal tipped to sign Brazil’s BEST No.9
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest have already been rejected by Igor Jesus, but South American football expert Tim Vickery has tipped Arsenal to be more successful in their pursuit of the 23-year-old if they make a move. Arsenal have been tipped to make a move for Botafogo striker Igor Jesus before the transfer window concludes.

arts.ttl: Report: Aston Villa believe they can persuade £10m player to join them instead of Arsenal before deadline day
arts.sum: Martin Odegaard has tried to convince the 18-year-old to join Arsenal 🤯

arts.ttl: Arsenal and Tottenham Target 'Wants to Join Man Utd'
arts.sum: Man Utd are reportedly interested in signing Mathys Tel, and insider Paul O Keefe has said he favours an Old Trafford move over Arsenal or Tottenham.
